title: mertensia maritima subsp. maritima
intro: Mertensia maritima subsp. maritima, also known as sea bluebell or blue whortleberry, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Mertensia maritima subsp. maritima include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Mertensia maritima subsp. maritima is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in the form of capsules or dried extracts for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
